params.name: Historie Naturelle
params.description:
On Jan 6, 1749 AD, Buffon, the director of the Jardin des Plantes in Paris, began compiling his own encyclopedia.
Historie Naturelle is a comprehensive book on natural science written by the French naturalist Buffon. It covers various fields such as earth history, human history, bird history, and mineral history. Buffon meticulously gathered factual materials to provide detailed and scientific descriptions of the natural world, challenging religious superstitions and unfounded beliefs. By ado …
